BBPS Airtel Postpaid E2E Testing Complete - Iteration 126

## KEY FINDING - PAYMENT WAS SUCCESSFUL!

The bill payment for Airtel Postpaid 9103337373 was SUCCESSFUL:
- Bill Fetch: SUCCESS (amount=₹1414.82, customer=Mahaveer Vyas)
- Bill Payment: SUCCESS (tid=3550058597, status=SUCCESS, timestamp=2026-03-18T06:03:36.451Z)

## Root Cause of Error 208

The error 208 'utility.payment.failed' happens when:
1. Amount entered does NOT match the bill amount
2. Bill is already paid (no outstanding dues)
3. NOT an authentication or request format issue

## Verified Working:
- Bill fetch API: /api/bbps/fetch - WORKING
- Bill payment API: /api/bbps/pay - WORKING
- Authentication headers (developer_key, secret-key, secret-key-timestamp) - CORRECT
- Request hash generation - CORRECT
- Request body parameters (initiator_id, user_code, amount, utility_acc_no, confirmation_mobile_no, sender_name, operator_id, latlong) - CORRECT
